title: Kilinochchi District Air Rover Crew Inaugurated
excerpt: A historic milestone as the first Air Rover Crew is established in the Kilinochchi District, expanding scouting opportunities for youth.

title: Clean Sri Lanka Campaign — Kilinochchi District Contribution
excerpt: Over 200 scouts participated in the nationwide Clean Sri Lanka initiative, collecting waste and planting trees across Karachchi and Pachchilaipalli zones.

title: Electrical Safety Awareness Workshop for Scouts
excerpt: A specialized workshop conducted in collaboration with the Ceylon Electricity Board to educate scouts about electrical safety.

title: District Scout Camporee 2026 Announced
excerpt: The annual Kilinochchi District Camporee will be held in March 2026 at the Iranamadu Tank grounds. Registration is now open for all units.
